nasb.text: But Joshua commanded the people, saying, “You shall not shout nor let your voice be heard nor let a word proceed out of your mouth, until the day I tell you, ‘Shout!’ Then you shall shout!”

esv.text: But Joshua commanded the people, “You shall not shout or make your voice heard, neither shall any word go out of your mouth, until the day I tell you to shout. Then you shall shout.”

cnv.text: 約書亞吩咐人民說：“你們不可呼喊，不可讓人聽見你們的聲音，連一句話也不可出口，等到我吩咐你們‘呼喊’的那天，你們才可以呼喊。”

ccb.text: 约书亚吩咐民众：“在我下令叫你们吶喊以前，谁也不许作声，一句话也不许说。”
